title: narcissus minor var. cuneiflorus
intro: Narcissus minor var. cuneiflorus, also known as the lesser jonquil, is a variety of the lesser narcissus, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a stimulant and to help reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Narcissus minor var. cuneiflorus include its potential to improve respiratory function, reduce fever, and provide relief from pain and anxiety. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be taken internally to promote overall health and well-being.
